mlb.headline: Kyle Schwarber back in Phillies lineup after 3-game absence
mlb.summary: After sitting out the last three games with a gastrointestinal illness, Phillies slugger Kyle Schwarber was back at designated hitter and batting second in Friday's game against Cleveland.

mlb.headline: Mariners reinstate Victor Robles from 10-day IL, option Connor Joe
mlb.summary: The Seattle Mariners have reinstated outfielder Victor Robles from the 10-day injured list and optioned utilityman Connor Joe to Triple-A Tacoma.

mlb.headline: Mariners minor leaguer Jose Zerpa suspended 80 games for drug violation
mlb.summary: Mariners pitcher Jose Zerpa was suspended for 80 games Friday following a positive test for the performance-enhancing substance Stanozolol under baseball's minor league drug program.

mlb.headline: Yankees' Jose Caballero (broken finger) back at SS after IL stint
mlb.summary: José Caballero was activated by the Yankees and returned to shortstop for Friday's series opener against the Rays after spending time on the 10-day IL with a broken right finger.

mlb.headline: Reds slugger Eugenio Suárez activated from 10-day injured list
mlb.summary: The Reds' struggling offense got a boost on Friday when designated hitter Eugenio Suárez was activated from the 10-day injured list.

nhl.headline: Steve O'Rourke out as coach of PWHL's Seattle Torrent
nhl.summary: Steve O'Rourke is out as coach of the Seattle Torrent after the expansion team finished last in the PWHL standings in its first season.

nhl.headline: Can Avalanche win without Cale Makar?
nhl.summary: P.K. Subban and Pat McAfee discuss the impact of Cale Makar's absence as the Colorado Avalanche face a must-win game.

nhl.headline: Avalanche's Cale Makar ruled out for Game 2 vs. Golden Knights
nhl.summary: Avalanche star defenseman Cale Makar has been ruled out of Game 2 of the Western Conference finals against the Golden Knights on Friday.

nba.headline: Sources: Spurs' Harper (adductor) a game-time decision vs. Thunder
nba.summary: San Antonio's Dylan Harper will be a game-time decision for Game 3 against Oklahoma City on Friday night due to a right adductor injury, sources tell ESPN's Shams Charania.

tennis.headline: French Open 2026: How to watch in the UK, schedule, prize money, Brit watch
tennis.summary: Find out all you need to know about the 2026 French Open in the UK, with dates, TV information, prize money and more.

tennis.headline: French Open prize money won't change this year, Mauresmo says
tennis.summary: The French Open will not adjust its prize money pool this year despite player complaints about their share of the major's revenue, tournament director Amelie Mauresmo said.

tennis.headline: French Open players plan media protest over prize money share
tennis.summary: Players at the French Open are planning to reduce media appearances ahead of the start of the Grand Slam to complain about their share of the prize money.

tennis.headline: Carlos Alcaraz pulls out of Wimbledon because of wrist injury
tennis.summary: Two-time Wimbledon champion Carlos Alcaraz on Tuesday said he is pulling out of the grass-court Grand Slam event next month because of his lingering wrist injury.
